purpose: Measures the quality of what the camera subsystem produced. Valid, geotagged images with sufficient overlap are foundational.
gate_action: Sets image_capture_score = 0. Raises FLAG: CRITICAL_IMAGE_FAILURE. No recoverable survey data.
weight_redistribution_rule: Active in all workflows (PPK, RTK, No-Correction). Never disabled.

purpose: Measures the quality of the raw GNSS observations recorded during the flight. The raw material for PPK post-processing.
weight_redistribution_rule: PRIMARY in PPK workflow. Disabled in no-correction workflow; in that case its weight is redistributed across remaining blocks.

purpose: Measures how faithfully the drone executed the planned mission. GSD, overlap, altitude fidelity, coverage, wind, completion.
weight_redistribution_rule: Active in all workflows. vibration_score and gimbal_score from BIN FDR data are now ACTIVE (no longer disabled).

purpose: Answers: 'How reliable is this calibration file for ODM lens correction?' Combines calibration provenance, hardware match, and recency.
weight_redistribution_rule: PARALLEL DELIVERABLE — NOT part of drone_score. CAL_CONF travels with the camera calibration file from the drone subsystem to the Processing Universe.
